questions.question: Describe the three components of a file service architecture in a distributed system. What is the primary function of each component?
questions.hint: Aim to explain each component and its function within 150-200 words.

questions.question: What is the difference between a file server and a file service?
questions.hint: Provide a brief explanation and example to illustrate the difference.

questions.question: Explain how a distributed file system (DFS) handles access control and permissions in a large-scale distributed system.
questions.hint: Aim to explain the concepts of access control and permissions within 150-200 words.
